sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: TD Cowen Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) Stock Price
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reduced its price target for Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) from $235.00 to $200.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of 61.38%. This comes amid mixed analyst revisions, with some firms raising targets and others lowering them, contributing to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $194.13. The article also highlights recent insider selling activity, with the CEO and CTO divesting significant shares.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Reassess Avino Silver & Gold Mines (TSX:ASM) After Its 5x Rally?
feed.summary: Avino Silver & Gold Mines (TSX:ASM) has experienced a significant rally, with its stock price increasing nearly 5x over the last year. Despite a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggesting the stock is 59.4% undervalued, its current P/E ratio of 51.75x is considerably higher than the industry average and Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 24.54x, indicating it might be overvalued by this metric. Investors are encouraged to use "Narratives" to form their own valuation based on realistic future expectations for revenue, earnings, and margins.

feed.title: Prologis: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Prologis Inc. (PLD) reported its fourth-quarter earnings, with funds from operations matching Wall Street expectations at $1.44 per share. The real estate investment trust posted net income of $1.4 billion and revenue of $2.25 billion, though its adjusted revenue of $2.09 billion missed analyst forecasts. For the full year, Prologis reported funds from operations of $5.56 billion and expects future funds from operations to be in the range of $6 to $6.20 per share.

feed.title: Cadence Bank (NYSE:CADE) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.34
feed.summary: Cadence Bank (NYSE:CADE) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.3438 per share, marking a 25% increase from its previous dividend. This dividend is payable on February 20th to shareholders of record on January 30th, resulting in an annualized dividend of $1.10 and a yield of 3.1%. The dividend appears sustainable, supported by a payout ratio of 32.4%, a 14-year history of annual increases, and analyst expectations for future EPS growth.

feed.title: Rogco LP Has $1.16 Million Stake in International Business Machines Corporation $IBM
feed.summary: Rogco LP significantly increased its stake in International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) by 2,730.3% in Q3, now holding 4,104 shares valued at $1.16 million. IBM recently surpassed quarterly earnings estimates with an EPS of $2.65 and revenue of $16.33 billion, demonstrating strong momentum in its AI and watsonx strategies. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for IBM, with an average target price of $305.29.

feed.title: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) Announces $0.45 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, representing an annualized dividend of $1.80 and a 0.9% yield. The company has a strong record of increasing its dividend for 42 consecutive years, with the payout covered by a 33.8% payout ratio. Cintas also reported slightly beating EPS estimates in the last quarter and authorized a $1.0 billion share buyback plan.

feed.title: VOC Energy Trust (NYSE:VOC) Plans $0.09 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: VOC Energy Trust (NYSE:VOC) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.09 per share, payable on February 13th to shareholders of record by January 30th. This dividend implies an annualized yield of 12.1%. Despite this, the company faces negative analyst sentiment, with a consensus "Sell" rating and a recent "sell" reaffirmation from Weiss Ratings.

feed.title: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC Has $45.81 Million Stock Holdings in S&P Global Inc. $SPGI
feed.summary: Wealth Enhancement Advisory Services LLC increased its stake in S&P Global Inc. (SPGI) by 4.9% during the third quarter, holding 95,184 shares valued at approximately $45.81 million. S&P Global exceeded Q3 earnings and revenue expectations, reported a raised quarterly dividend of $0.97, and maintains a consensus "Buy" rating from analysts with a target price of $615.64. The company's strong financial performance includes an 8.8% year-over-year revenue increase and a positive outlook for FY 2025 EPS.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Salesforce (CRM), Dell Technologies (DELL) and Broadcom (AVGO)
feed.summary: Three analysts from Deutsche Bank and Evercore ISI have issued bullish ratings for Salesforce (CRM), Dell Technologies (DELL), and Broadcom (AVGO). Salesforce received a Buy rating with a $325.00 price target, Dell Technologies also got a Buy rating with a $180.00 price target, and Broadcom had its Buy rating reiterated with a $430.00 price target. The consensus among analysts suggests significant upside potential for all three technology stocks.

feed.title: Travelers says it invested $1.5B in AI, tech initiatives in 2025
feed.summary: Travelers Cos. invested over $1.5 billion in artificial intelligence and other technology initiatives in 2025, according to Chairman and CEO Alan Schnitzer. This investment supported the expansion of generative AI tools across the company, including a partnership with Anthropic to provide personalized AI assistants to nearly 10,000 employees. The company also reported strong financial results for both the fourth quarter and full year of 2025.

feed.title: Cummins Secures $2.1 Million from The Centralia Coal Transition Grants Energy Technology Fund to Advance Hybrid Haul Truck Technology and Drive Decarbonization in Mining
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. has secured a $2.1 million grant from the Centralia Coal Transition Grants Energy Technology Board to further develop and test hybrid haul truck systems. This funding, supporting activities through 2027, will accelerate Cummins' efforts, through its subsidiary First Mode, to reduce carbon emissions in the mining industry by deploying hybrid technology that can achieve up to 30% fuel savings. The initiative also includes training, documentation, and customer engagement, with plans for trial and limited production units, and potential expansion into other heavy industries.

feed.title: Adobe Acrobat now lets you edit files using prompts, generate podcast summaries
feed.summary: Adobe is integrating more AI features into Acrobat, enabling users to edit files using text prompts, generate podcast summaries from documents, and create presentations from "Adobe Spaces." These new capabilities aim to streamline content creation and document management, allowing for instant presentation generation and easier collaborative editing with AI-generated summaries and citations. The update also introduces various AI assistant roles to customize the user experience.

feed.title: FOXXW SEC Filings
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for investors and traders to access official regulatory documents for FOXXW SEC filings, including 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly earnings, 8-K material events, and insider trading forms. Each filing is enhanced with expert analysis from Rhea-AI, offering insights into the potential impact on FOXXW's stock performance, including AI-generated summaries, sentiment scores, and end-of-day stock performance data. Recently, Foxx Development Holdings Inc. announced the appointment of Michelle Jie Shen as a director with an annual fee of $60,000, formalized on January 20, 2026, and retroactively effective from December 22, 2025.

feed.title: Headline:Investors who lost money with Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM) shares should contact the Shareholders Foundation in connection with Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Shareholders Foundation, Inc. has issued an update regarding a pending lawsuit against Humana Inc. (NYSE: HUM). Investors who purchased Humana shares before July 2022 and still hold them are encouraged to contact the Foundation for information on their options. The lawsuit alleges that Humana downplayed the impact of increased medical costs from pent-up demand for healthcare services, which negatively affected the company's adjusted EPS.

feed.title: How ADP stayed on Fortune’s ‘Most Admired Companies’ list for 20 years
feed.summary: ADP has been named one of Fortune's "World's Most Admired Companies" for the 20th consecutive year in 2026. This recognition highlights ADP's commitment to product and service quality, global effectiveness, and innovation in HR and payroll solutions. The company's focus on integrating AI to enhance human creativity and solve workplace pain points was also cited as a key factor in its consistent ranking.

feed.title: RTX’s Collins Aerospace expands distribution network for C-130 parts
feed.summary: RTX's Collins Aerospace has expanded its C-130 parts distribution network through new three-year agreements with Integrated Procurement Technologies, S3 AeroDefense, and Derco. This move aims to enhance hardware and logistics support for C-130 Hercules wheels and brakes for international operators. The partnerships are expected to improve fleet readiness for the widely used military transport aircraft.

feed.title: Fiber/Small Cell Business Sale Sparks Confidence for Crown Castle (CCI)
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. (CCI) is gaining confidence from analysts following the sale of its fiber/small cell segment, allowing it to become a pure-play tower business. KeyBanc assigned an Overweight rating with a $120 price target, citing a 32% upside and contribution from a share buyback program. Wells Fargo maintained an Overweight rating despite a lowered price target due to potential proceeds from a lawsuit against DISH Wireless.

feed.title: Hershey unites Olympians and families in tear-jerking campaign
feed.summary: Hershey has launched its first major creative push since 2018 with the "Hershey. It’s Your Happy Place" campaign, ahead of the 2026 Winter Olympics. The campaign's hero spot features U.S. Olympic and Paralympic athletes and their families, highlighting the emotional support behind their success, culminating in surprise in-person reunions and limited-edition chocolate medals. This Olympic effort kicks off a year of cultural moments for Hershey, including FIFA World Cup activations, America's 250th birthday, and a biopic about founder Milton Hershey.

feed.title: KeyBanc Lowers Price Target for Crown Castle (CCI) to $115, Main
feed.summary: KeyBanc analyst Brandon Nispel has reaffirmed an Overweight rating for Crown Castle (CCI) but reduced the price target from $120 to $115. This adjustment follows similar price target reductions from other major firms like Goldman Sachs, UBS, and JP Morgan in January 2026. Crown Castle, a REIT, primarily operates wireless towers and is expected to divest its fiber business in 2026 to focus solely on towers.

feed.title: Bernstein reiterates Underperform rating on Fastenal stock amid onsite closures
feed.summary: Bernstein has reiterated an Underperform rating on Fastenal (NASDAQ:FAST) stock, setting a $38.00 price target despite the company's 11% sales growth in Q4 2025. Although Fastenal’s earnings per share met consensus, the industrial distributor missed gross margin and operating profit projections and closed 25% of its U.S. onsite locations in 2025, marking the first decline since 2014. The reiteration of the Underperform rating is supported by InvestingPro data showing Fastenal trading above its Fair Value and at a high P/E ratio relative to near-term earnings growth.

feed.title: BankUnited's (NYSE:BKU) Q4 CY2025 Sales Beat Estimates
feed.summary: BankUnited (NYSE:BKU) reported strong Q4 CY2025 results, with sales growing 7.8% year-on-year to $288.2 million, surpassing Wall Street's expectations. The regional bank also beat analyst estimates for non-GAAP profit at $0.94 per share and saw its net interest income exceed forecasts. The article highlights the company's financial performance, including its net interest margin, revenue, and tangible book value per share.

feed.title: PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP Shares Sold by Stock Yards Bank & Trust Co.
feed.summary: Stock Yards Bank & Trust Co. decreased its stake in PepsiCo, Inc. by 7.0% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 7,264 shares and ending with 97,210 shares valued at $13.65 million. Despite this sale, large institutions generally increased their holdings, with institutional ownership reaching 73.07%. Analysts are mixed on PEP, holding a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $161.32.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Public Service Enterprise Group to $81 From $87, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) to $81 from $87, while maintaining an "Equalweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a moderated outlook for the utility company. The article also lists other recent analyst activities for Public Service Enterprise Group, showing a mix of upgrades, downgrades, and price target changes from various firms.

feed.title: Stock Yards Bank & Trust Co. Has $56.80 Million Stock Holdings in ASML Holding N.V. $ASML
feed.summary: Stock Yards Bank & Trust Co. increased its stake in ASML Holding N.V. by 3.4% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 58,674 shares valued at $56.80 million, making ASML its 15th largest holding. Wall Street analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for ASML with a target price of $1,392.75, driven by catalysts like TSMC's increased AI-focused capital expenditure. However, geopolitical risks and U.S.-China trade tensions present potential downside threats for the semiconductor company.

feed.title: Stock Yards Bank & Trust Co. Has $7.06 Million Stock Position in Danaher Corporation $DHR
feed.summary: Stock Yards Bank & Trust Co. reduced its stake in Danaher Corporation by 15.8% in Q3, bringing its total holding to 35,623 shares valued at approximately $7.06 million. Meanwhile, company insiders sold over 30,000 shares worth $6.61 million in the last three months. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Danaher, with an average price target of $251.87.

feed.title: Register Financial Advisors LLC Raises Stock Position in Beazer Homes USA, Inc. $BZH
feed.summary: Register Financial Advisors LLC significantly increased its stake in Beazer Homes USA (NYSE:BZH) by 54.7% in the third quarter, now holding 152,152 shares valued at approximately $3.735 million. This makes Beazer Homes its 11th largest holding, and other institutional investors have also boosted their positions. Despite strong institutional ownership at 85.65% and a recent earnings beat, the stock currently holds a "Hold" rating from Wall Street analysts with a consensus price target of $31.33.

feed.title: Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET Stake Increased by Stock Yards Bank & Trust Co.
feed.summary: Stock Yards Bank & Trust Co. significantly increased its stake in Arista Networks (ANET) by 123.2% in the third quarter of 2025, now owning 31,229 shares valued at $4.55 million. This increase contributes to the 82.47% institutional ownership of the stock, while company insiders have been net sellers, disposing of over 160,000 shares worth approximately $20.49 million. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Arista Networks with a consensus target price of $164.44, following the company's recent beat on quarterly earnings estimates.

feed.title: American Electric Power Company, Inc. to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.95 (NASDAQ:AEP)
feed.summary: American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.95 per share, payable on March 10th to shareholders of record on February 10th. This translates to an annualized dividend of $3.80 and a yield of 3.2%. The company has a strong dividend history, having raised its payout for 15 consecutive years, with a payout ratio around 60.4% which is well-covered by expected earnings.

feed.title: Lam Research To Rally Around 17%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
feed.summary: This article compiles ten top analyst forecasts for Wednesday, highlighting price target changes and rating adjustments for various companies. Notably, Deutsche Bank increased Lam Research Corp's price target, suggesting a potential 17% rally. Other companies covered include Ardelyx Inc, Southern Copper Corp, Waste Management Inc, Carter's Inc, Netflix Inc, 3M Co, ServiceNow Inc, Westlake Corp, and Chipotle Mexican Grill Inc.

feed.title: Qualcomm Schedules First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Qualcomm (NASDAQ: QCOM) announced that it will release its first-quarter fiscal 2026 financial results on Wednesday, February 4, 2026, after market close. The earnings release will be available on the company's Investor Relations website and furnished to the SEC on a Form 8-K. Qualcomm will also host a live conference call on February 4, 2026, at 1:45 p.m. Pacific Time to discuss the results, with an audio replay available for 30 days.

feed.title: Netflix Shares Fall After Earnings, Q1 Guidance Below Estimates
feed.summary: Netflix (NASDAQ: NFLX) shares dropped after the company released fourth-quarter financial results and first-quarter guidance that fell below analyst estimates. Despite beating Q4 EPS and revenue expectations, several firms lowered their price targets on the stock. Technical analysis indicates a challenging environment with the stock trading below key moving averages, though an oversold RSI suggests a potential rebound.

feed.title: Why Hershey’s first campaign in 8 years kicks off with an Olympics tie-in
feed.summary: Hershey’s has launched its first major creative campaign in eight years, "It's Your Happy Place," with an Olympics tie-in ahead of the 2026 Winter Games. The campaign, supported by a 20% increase in marketing budget, features Olympic and Paralympic athletes and emphasizes happiness as a journey, not just a destination. The brand will release limited-edition chocolate medals and engage consumers through various digital and social channels as the platform continues throughout the year.

feed.title: Powering Business Growth: Regions Bank Selects Worldpay to Transform Business Payments
feed.summary: Regions Bank has partnered with Worldpay, a Global Payments company, to enhance its business clients' payment acceptance and cash flow management. This collaboration will provide cutting-edge payments technology, including multi-layered fraud protection and value-added services, to businesses of all sizes served by Regions Bank. The initiative complements Regions360, the bank's strategy to deliver tailored financial services through a network of specialists.

feed.title: Chatham Lodging Trust Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Call to be Held on Wednesday, February 25, 2026
feed.summary: Chatham Lodging Trust (NYSE: CLDT) announced it will report its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, before market opening. Following the release, the company will host a conference call at 10:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results, with participation from CEO Jeffrey H. Fisher, COO Dennis M. Craven, and CFO Jeremy Wegner. Shareholders can access the call via webcast or telephone.

feed.title: Oceania Cruises® Reveals Oceania Sonata™ Maiden Season Voyages
feed.summary: Oceania Cruises has revealed the maiden season voyages for its new ship, Oceania Sonata™, the first in the Sonata Class, set to debut in August 2027. The inaugural season features 22 sailings from August 2027 to April 2028, covering over 90 destinations across Europe, the Caribbean, Mexico, and Central and South America. Bookings for these voyages open on January 28, 2026.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Raises Price Target on KLA Corp. to $1,560 From $1,250, Keeps Hold Rating
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has increased its price target for KLA Corp. (KLAC) to $1,560 from $1,250, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the company's valuation by the financial institution. The report was published on January 21, 2026, at 09:03 am EST.

feed.title: Venus Concept to exit NASDAQ and end SEC reporting obligations
feed.summary: Venus Concept Inc. announced its decision to delist from The Nasdaq Stock Market and deregister its common stock with the SEC. The company plans to file Form 25 with the SEC on or about January 29, 2026, and Form 15 shortly after, which will suspend its reporting obligations. This move aims to reduce costs and administrative burdens, with the company expecting to pay a one-time termination fee of $50,000 to NASDAQ.

feed.title: Premium Guard Inc. Earns Top O'Reilly Auto Parts Supplier Honor for the Second Year in a Row
feed.summary: Premium Guard Inc. (PGI) was honored with dual supplier awards by O'Reilly Auto Parts, including the prestigious Supplier of the Year for the second consecutive year and the new Omnichannel Partnership Award. These accolades recognize PGI's exceptional product quality, reliable supply chain, and effective merchandising strategies. Anan Bishara, Founder and CEO, highlighted the awards as a testament to the company's commitment to customer satisfaction, operational excellence, and innovation.

feed.title: Hershey Debuts 'Happy Place' Olympic Push 01/21/2026
feed.summary: Hershey is launching its first Hershey's brand campaign since 2018, increasing its marketing budget by 20% to support "Hershey's. It's Your Happy Place." The campaign debuts ahead of the 2026 Winter Olympics and Paralympics, introducing five U.S. Olympians and Paralympians with a focus on happiness beyond medals. This initiative signals a broader shift in the company's brand storytelling, integrating paid, earned, shared, and owned channels, moving away from a primary focus on paid media.

feed.title: Cadence's new audio DSP boosts AI speed 8X, cuts power 25%
feed.summary: Cadence (Nasdaq: CDNS) has launched its Tensilica HiFi iQ DSP IP, a sixth-generation digital signal processor built for next-generation voice AI and immersive audio applications. This new architecture offers 2X greater compute performance, 8X higher AI performance, and over 25% energy savings compared to its predecessor, the Tensilica HiFi 5s DSP. The HiFi iQ DSP aims to meet the increasing computational demands of home entertainment, automotive infotainment, and smartphone markets, supporting advanced codecs and enabling seamless natural language processing and on-device AI.

feed.title: New RTX parts deals expand support to keep C-130 fleets mission-ready
feed.summary: Collins Aerospace, an RTX business, has signed three-year parts distribution agreements with Integrated Procurement Technologies, S3 AeroDefense, and Derco to enhance hardware and logistics support for C-130 Hercules wheels and brakes. These agreements aim to expand Collins' distribution network globally, ensuring improved fleet readiness for the C-130, an aircraft operated by over 70 countries. The DURACARB® brakes, produced in Troy, Ohio, offer longer life and reduced maintenance for the C-130 and other commercial and military aircraft.

feed.title: Worldpay deal upgrades how Regions Bank small businesses get paid
feed.summary: Regions Bank has partnered with Worldpay, a Global Payments company, to enhance payment technology for its business clients. This collaboration will offer advanced tools for accepting payments, robust fraud protection, and value-added services to businesses of all sizes, from small enterprises to major corporations. The initiative aims to improve customer experience, optimize acceptance rates, and provide unique customer insights, complementing Regions Bank's existing client-focused strategies.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern Launches East Edge Double-Stack Service Connecting Chicago and New England
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern has launched its new East Edge double-stack intermodal corridor, connecting Chicago and New England. This $64 million investment significantly reduces transit times by up to 10 hours and substantially increases freight capacity into a key eastern market, addressing rising consumer demand and e-commerce growth in New England. The project involved extensive infrastructure upgrades and coordination with multiple partners, marking a major milestone in Norfolk Southern's network modernization strategy.

feed.title: New double-stack rail link cuts Chicago–New England trips by up to 10 hours
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern has launched its "East Edge" double-stack intermodal corridor, connecting Chicago and New England, a $64 million investment aiming to reduce transit times by up to 10 hours. This new route enables fully double-stacked 9,000-foot trains, significantly increasing capacity and modernizing freight transport into New England. The project involved extensive infrastructure upgrades and is expected to boost intermodal growth and support the regional economy.

feed.title: HERSHEY'S CELEBRATES HAPPINESS AS 'THE REAL GOLD' WITH NEW TEAM USA CAMPAIGN AND LIMITED-EDITION CHOCOLATE MEDALS DURING THE OLYMPIC AND PARALYMPIC WINTER GAMES MILANO CORTINA 2026
feed.summary: Hershey's has launched a new campaign, "Hershey's. It's Your Happy Place," for the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026, celebrating happiness as "the real gold" beyond athletic achievements. The campaign features five Team USA athletes sharing their stories of finding joy and will introduce limited-edition chocolate medals to commemorate everyday moments of happiness. These initiatives reinforce Hershey's role in inspiring human connection and optimism.

feed.title: New South DeKalb Xfinity store offers hands-on tech and cuts travel time
feed.summary: Comcast has opened a second Xfinity Store in South DeKalb, located at 3910 Flat Shoals Parkway, following a grand opening on January 16. The new store aims to provide residents with convenient access to Xfinity products, services, and in-person support, reducing travel time and enhancing connectivity resources for the community. It offers interactive experiences with products like Xfinity Internet, Mobile, X1, and Home Solutions, and includes experts for Comcast Business services.

feed.title: Frank Morales has been elected President of the Utility Workers Union of America (UWUA) Local 1-2 and Immediately Files Legal Action Against Con Edison on day one.
feed.summary: Frank Morales has been elected President of the Utility Workers Union of America (UWUA) Local 1-2 by a decisive mandate from nearly 8,000 members. On his first day in office, Morales swiftly filed a lawsuit against Con Edison for unpaid wages owed to union workers, exhibiting a direct and fearless leadership style. This legal action targets wage violations affecting New York families, with Morales vowing to pursue full recovery of lost pay and damages without delay or closed-door deals.

feed.title: What Makes American Homes 4 Rent (AMH) Attractive
feed.summary: American Homes 4 Rent (AMH) is considered an attractive real estate investment trust by hedge funds. While Keefe Bruyette upgraded its rating to Outperform with a $37 price target, BMO Capital downgraded AMH to Market Perform, also with a $37 price target, due to President Trump's proposal to ban institutional investment in single-family homes. American Homes 4 Rent operates and leases single-family rental homes and manages an online platform for tenants.

feed.title: Charles Schwab’s profit rises on higher interest income, trading revenues
feed.summary: Charles Schwab reported a rise in fourth-quarter profit, driven by increased interest income and strong trading revenues amid market volatility. The company's net revenue climbed 19% to US$6.34-billion, slightly below analyst estimates, while net income reached US$2.46-billion. Schwab also saw record core net new assets for the quarter, bringing its total asset gathering for the year 2025 to over half a trillion U.S. dollars.

feed.title: TD Cowen Lowers Netflix Price Target to $112 Amid Q1 Outlook Miss
feed.summary: TD Cowen has lowered Netflix's price target to $112 from $115, while maintaining a 'Buy' rating, due to the company's disappointing Q1 revenue and EPS outlook. This adjustment comes as Netflix forecasts Q1 revenue slightly below consensus and EPS below Wall Street expectations, with concerns also arising from the expense outlook related to its Warner Bros. Discovery acquisition. Other analysts, including Pivotal Research, Wolfe Research, and Canaccord, have also reduced their price targets for Netflix, citing similar concerns regarding financial guidance and acquisition impact.
